detail.description:
The Ultimate Extraction & Warfare FPS — Delta Force New Season ECHO Is Live!

OPERATOR-BASED EXTRACTION SHOOTER
Join G.T.I. and select from elite Operators, each equipped with unique tactical gadgets and traits. Whether you favor Detection Arrows, Magnetic Bombs, or Loitering Munitions, coordinate your squad's abilities to outmaneuver rivals in high-stakes missions.

OUTSMART BOSSES OUTGUN PLAYERS
Take on heavily armed mercenaries and ruthless bosses guarding high-value loot, but stay sharp — th
